task.title: Create relayauth product page in relay Next.js app

events.content: Implement relayauth as a standalone landing page under web/app/auth using a client content component and a dedicated CSS module that mirrors the relay homepage structure: Implement relayauth as a standalone landing page under web/app/auth using a client content component and a dedicated CSS module that mirrors the relay homepage structure

raw.question: Implement relayauth as a standalone landing page under web/app/auth using a client content component and a dedicated CSS module that mirrors the relay homepage structure
raw.chosen: Implement relayauth as a standalone landing page under web/app/auth using a client content component and a dedicated CSS module that mirrors the relay homepage structure
raw.reasoning: Keeps routing simple, reuses SiteNav/SiteFooter/FadeIn patterns, and allows interactive SDK tabs plus lightweight auth-specific animation without changing shared components

retrospective.summary: Created the relayauth product page in web/app/auth with a server route wrapper, client content component, auth animation, tabbed SDK examples, features grid, tool badges, why cards, get-started curl flow, and dedicated CSS module. Verified with ESLint and web TypeScript.
